_meta.description: Set up a SCIM or custom integration for a named SaaS service in YeshID. Can create the application if it doesn't exist yet, then configure authentication. The LLM is expected to look up the service's SCIM/API documentation and supply the correct auth values before running this payload.

paramNotes.service_name: Display name of the SaaS service (e.g. 'GitHub', 'Slack', 'Okta')
paramNotes.auth_type: Bearer | OAuth2 | Basic | Custom API key | None
paramNotes.base_url: Root API URL for the integration (from service's SCIM docs)
paramNotes.bearer_token: Bearer token if auth_type is Bearer (from service's API settings)
paramNotes.app_id: Optional: existing YeshID application ID. If not provided, the app will be created first.

_meta.note: Before running, CoWork should: (1) search docs.yeshid.com for integration instructions for the service, (2) look up the service's SCIM endpoint and token, (3) populate params accordingly.

chain.code: (function() { const appId = '{{app_id}}'; if (appId && appId !== '{{app_id}}') return { skip: true, reason: 'app_id provided, skipping creation' }; const rows = [...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')]; const existing = rows.find(r => r.textContent.toLowerCase().includes('{{service_name}}'.toLowerCase())); if (existing) { const link = existing.querySelector('a[href]'); if (link) { link.click(); } else { existing.click(); } return { skip: true, foundExisting: true }; } return { skip: false }; })()
chain.note: Check if app already exists. If yes, navigate to it directly. If no, proceed to create.

chain.code: (function() { const rows = [...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')]; const appRow = rows.find(r => r.textContent.toLowerCase().includes('{{service_name}}'.toLowerCase())); if (!appRow) return { found: false, error: 'App row not found after creation' }; const link = appRow.querySelector('a[href]'); if (link) { link.click(); return { found: true, href: link.href }; } appRow.click(); return { found: true }; })()

(function() { const intType = '{{integration_type}}' || 'scim'; const radios = [...document.querySelectorAll('input[type="radio"], .v-radio')]; const target = radios.find(r => r.textContent?.toLowerCase().includes(intType) || r.value?.toLowerCase().includes(intType)); if (target) { target.click(); return { selected: intType }; } return { notFound: true, available: radios.map(r => r.value || r.textContent?.trim()) }; })()
chain.note: Select SCIM or Build Your Own integration type.

chain.code: (function() { const authType = '{{auth_type}}'; const selects = [...document.querySelectorAll('.v-select, .v-autocomplete')]; const authSelect = selects.find(s => s.textContent.toLowerCase().includes('authentication type') || s.querySelector('.v-label')?.textContent.toLowerCase().includes('auth')); if (authSelect) { const input = authSelect.querySelector('input'); if (input) { input.click(); return { opened: true }; } } return { notFound: true }; })()

(async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const authType = '{{auth_type}}'; const options = [...document.querySelectorAll('.v-overlay--active .v-list-item, .v-list-item')]; const match = options.find(o => o.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === authType.toLowerCase()); if (match) { match.click(); return { selected: authType }; } return { notFound: true, available: options.map(o => o.textContent.trim()) }; })()

(function() { function findVuetifyInput(labelTerms) { return [...document.querySelectorAll('.v-input, .v-field')].map(c => { const label = c.querySelector('.v-label, .v-field-label'); const input = c.querySelector('input, textarea'); if (!label || !input) return null; const t = label.textContent.trim().toLowerCase(); const score = labelTerms.filter(term => t.includes(term.toLowerCase())).length; return score > 0 ? { input, score } : null; }).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b) => b.score - a.score)[0]?.input; } function setNativeValue(el, val) { const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; setter.call(el, val); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); } const baseUrl = '{{api_base_url}}'; const token = '{{bearer_token}}'; const results = {}; if (baseUrl) { const el = findVuetifyInput(['base url', 'root api', 'api url']); if (el) { setNativeValue(el, baseUrl); results.baseUrl = true; } } if (token) { const el = findVuetifyInput(['token', 'bearer', 'api key', 'secret']) || document.querySelector('input[type="password"]'); if (el) { setNativeValue(el, token); results.token = true; } } return results; })()
chain.note: Fill Base URL and bearer token using Vuetify label resolution.

preRunChecklist.description: Steps CoWork should complete BEFORE generating this payload.
steps: 1. Search docs.yeshid.com for '{service_name} integration' to find YeshID-specific setup instructions
2. Search {service_name} documentation for 'SCIM provisioning endpoint' or 'SCIM base URL'
3. In {service_name}'s admin console, generate a SCIM token or API key
4. Confirm integration_type: most modern SaaS (Slack, GitHub, Okta, Notion, etc.) support SCIM 2.0
5. Populate params: service_name, auth_type='Bearer', base_url={scim_endpoint}, bearer_token={token}
